name: Calvin Mickelson
title: Software Developer
summary: Fort Collins-based software developer with a B.S. in Computer Science and hands-on experience building performance-sensitive C++ systems, custom rendering pipelines, developer tooling, real-time applications, and machine learning/computer vision projects. Strong in C++, Python, and JavaScript, with a focus on fast, debuggable software that works under real constraints.
websiteSummary: I am a Fort Collins-based software developer focused on practical systems work: C++ engines, rendering tools, real-time applications, and computer vision projects. I like building software that is fast, debuggable, and useful under real constraints.

projects.title: ENGINE 2.0 / VIBBLE Engine
projects.description: Custom C++/SDL engine with dynamic lighting, parallax rendering, procedural maps, editor tooling, and JSON asset workflows.
bullets: Built a custom 2D engine with dynamic lighting, parallax rendering, layered world composition, and clear separation between runtime, editor, and tooling systems.
Implemented procedural map generation with room layering, sector-based placement, parent-child room relationships, collision/interaction geometry, and JSON-driven assets.
Developed editor tooling for asset management, rendering controls, animation caching, and scalable content pipelines supporting rapid iteration.

projects.title: auto_edit
projects.description: Python generator for beat-synced glitch edits, with BPM/drop analysis, OCR text overlays, and batch-rendered vertical MP4 outputs.
bullets: Built an automated video generator that scans audio/media inputs, detects beats, drop timing, and bass energy, then schedules edits against the music timeline.
Added OCR-driven text overlay preprocessing, configurable glitch/transition effects, dry-run timeline debugging, and batch rendering of numbered vertical MP4 variants.

projects.title: ASL Interpretation Model
projects.description: Real-time ASL recognition pipeline using MediaPipe hand landmarks, TensorFlow classification, and live video input.
bullets: Built a real-time ASL recognition pipeline using hand landmark extraction and classification from live video input.
Trained and evaluated models for sign prediction and implemented preprocessing to improve inference stability and usability.

projects.title: SSH_MAVLINK
projects.description: Remote multirotor control over 4G LTE with real-time telemetry, video streaming, and MAVLink command links.
bullets: Developed a remote multirotor control system over 4G LTE with real-time telemetry, video streaming, and command/control links.
Enabled remote manual and autonomous flight workflows using MAVLink-based communication.

projects.title: SmileScope
projects.description: Python and MediaPipe facial landmark app for smile detection and annotated screenshot capture under noisy motion.
bullets: Built a real-time facial landmark application to detect smiles and capture annotated screenshots under noisy motion conditions.
Used MediaPipe landmarks and Python image processing to support lightweight computer vision interaction experiments.
Supported manufacturing control operations in a high-volume semiconductor production environment.
Worked across schedule-driven workflows and internal production systems to help maintain continuity and process visibility.
Assisted with electrical and generator installations and supported troubleshooting of networking, firmware, and control-system issues.
Worked in a fast-paced, high-volume environment while coordinating prep, line execution, and quality standards across daily service.

education.details: Coursework and project work centered on software engineering, algorithms, systems, data, and applied machine learning.
